mapper.insert: INSERT INTO risk_feedback( feedback_id, user_id, type, status, decision_id, punish_id, content, result, operator_id, create_time, update_time ) VALUES( #{feedbackId}, #{userId}, #{type}, #{status}, #{decisionId}, #{punishId}, #{content}, #{result}, #{operatorId}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT feedback_id, user_id, type, status, decision_id, punish_id, content, result, operator_id, create_time, update_time FROM risk_feedback WHERE feedback_id = #{feedbackId}
mapper.update: UPDATE risk_feedback SET status = #{status}, result = #{result}, operator_id = #{operatorId}, update_time = NOW() WHERE feedback_id = #{feedbackId}
mapper.select: SELECT feedback_id, user_id, type, status, decision_id, punish_id, content, result, operator_id, create_time, update_time FROM risk_feedback WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY create_time DESC, feedback_id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
